SEARCH
Package pl.edu.wit.studentmanager.service

Class AssignmentService

java.lang.Object
pl.edu.wit.studentmanager.service.AssignmentService
public final class AssignmentService extends Object
Zarządza przypisaniem studenta do grupy.
